div1.entryFree:
Needless, 1) not requisite, unnecessary, superfluous: Meas. V, 92. LLL II, 117. John V, 5, 5. Troil. I, 3, 71. Cor. II, 3, 124. Tim. I, 2, 100.
2) without cogency, without sufficient cause, groundless: sigh at each his n. heavings, Wint. II, 3, 35. pray God I prove a n. coward, R3 III, 2, 90. n. diffidences, Lr. I, 2, 161. n. jealousy, Cymb. V, 4, 66.
3) not wanting, having enough: weeping into the n. stream, As II, 1, 46.
